title: San's Music Discs
description: This mod adds a bunch of music discs from various artists!
body:
Hi! This is a mod I made for fun that's intented for a very specific Minecraft server between friends, it adds several new music discs from various artists! 

Some of the current music discs available in the mod are:
- stal (Remix) - FlyxTheKid
- Pigstep (Remix) - FlyxTheKid
- anemoia - Oliver Buckland
- Browser History - Graham Kartna
- An Obsession With Kit - Graham Kartna
- Perfumed Letters - Graham Kartna
- Subtext - Graham Kartna
- Bubblegum K.k (Miku Version) - lovesickle ft. Hatsune Miku
- icosa - Oliver Buckland
- trifecta - Oliver Buckland
- tetractys - Oliver Buckland
- Temptation Stairway (Waltz Variation) - Metaroom
- Hourglass Meadow - Oliver Buckland
- Radical Phindoll - Oliver Buckland
- Dead God Graveyard - Oliver Buckland
- M@GICAL☆CURE! LOVE ♥ SHOT! - Sawtowne ft. Hatsune Miku
- メロメロイド (Mellomelloid) - Kairikibear ft. Hatsune Miku
- Rabbit Hole - DECO*27 ft. Hatsune Miku
- Miku - Anamanaguchi ft. Hatsune Miku
- God-ish - PinocchioP ft. Hatsune Miku
- 32ki ft. Hatsune Miku & Kasane Teto – Mesmerizer
- AZALI – please do not listen to this song
- AZALI – savepoint
- Aaron Cherof – Precipice
- GearRabbit – Rabbit Hole (8-Bit Remix)
- Oliver Buckland – the insides of tears
- Daniel Pemberton – The Orb Of Dreamers
- Toby Fox – Ruins
- Toby Fox – Home
- Toby Fox – Another Medium
- Toby Fox – It's Raining Somewhere Else
- Toby Fox – CORE
- Toby Fox & Void Red ft. Kasane Teto – Raise Up Your Bat
- Toby Fox – TV WORLD
- Toby Fox – Castle Funk

I plan to add more songs in the future!
